nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs every 6 hours. Adjust interval for real-time needs.

nodes.name: Twitter / X Source
nodes.notes: Simulated. Replace jsCode body with HTTP Request to Twitter API v2 search/recent endpoint using Bearer Token.

nodes.name: Reddit Source
nodes.notes: Simulated. Replace with HTTP Request node to Reddit Search API. Requires Reddit OAuth2 credentials.

nodes.name: News / RSS Source
nodes.notes: Simulated. Replace with HTTP Request to NewsAPI or an RSS Feed node. Supports any RSS/Atom feed URL.

nodes.name: Blog & Review Source
nodes.notes: Simulated. Replace with HTTP Request + HTML Extract nodes for blog scraping, or connect to G2/Trustpilot APIs.

nodes.name: Merge All Sources
nodes.notes: Merges mentions from all 4 sources into a single unified stream.

nodes.name: Deduplicate
nodes.notes: Removes duplicate mention IDs. In production, cross-reference against a database table of processed IDs.

nodes.name: Language Filter
nodes.notes: Filter to supported languages. Extend with translation node (DeepL/Google Translate) for multilingual support.

nodes.name: HuggingFace Classifier
nodes.notes:
Runs classify.py which uses:
- Model 1: cardiffnlp/twitter-roberta-base-sentiment-latest (sentiment)
- Model 2: facebook/bart-large-mnli (zero-shot topics)
Adjust path to match your deployment environment.

nodes.name: Load Classified Results
nodes.notes: Reads the JSON output from the classifier script.

nodes.name: Alert Detection
nodes.notes: Detects crisis signals and negative spikes. In production, send results to Slack, email, or PagerDuty via notification nodes.

nodes.name: Write to Data Store
nodes.notes: Writes output to mentions_classified.json. In production: replace with PostgreSQL Insert or MongoDB node.
